root_cause: DECIPHER API requires authentication via client key. All endpoints return 403 with JSON error: {"errors":[{"title":"Forbidden","status":"403","detail":"Client key not provided"}]}. The DDD sub-API at decipher.sanger.ac.uk returns HTML only. Registration for API access likely requires institutional affiliation with the DECIPHER consortium.
workaround: Orphanet provides comprehensive rare disease gene-disease associations, phenotypes, epidemiology, and ICD mappings via the Orphadata and RDcode APIs. GenCC provides gene-disease validity classifications from multiple curators including ClinGen.
investigation_notes: All endpoints at www.deciphergenomics.org/api/ return 403 with jsonapi error format
DDD sub-API at decipher.sanger.ac.uk returns HTML pages, not JSON
Not viable for public ToolUniverse tools without registration
